label: The Sealed Store
description: The Sealed Store occupies a cramped ground-floor chamber behind Charterhouse Lodgings’ barred vestibule, its blackened brick walls crossed by riveted iron straps that anchor into older refounding masonry. Built-in cupboards and tiered shelves line the room, while a squat iron-hasped chest sits beneath a soot-stained lintel to protect goods under Cindervale’s toll and quarantine ordinances. A licensable tally-board and corded sealing points are fixed to one wall, formalizing the custody of provisions and chartered effects. Air enters only through a shuttered slit-window, leaving the space dry, dim, and deliberately defensible.
